transcript: Speaker A: wake up. woken up. Speaker B: I didn't expect you to help me so much! Speaker C: Tomorrow's Sunday, so why are you setting the alarm?
on_screen_text: What would you like to learn? Intermediate English, Spanish, French, German, Italian. CONTINUE. Complete the sentence: I've _____ three times already, but I don't need to _____ until eight! wake up, woken up. Incorrect. Correct Answer: woken up, wake up. Keep trying! Speak this sentence: I didn't expect you to help me so much! TAP TO SPEAK. Nicely done! Type the missing word: Tomorrow's Sunday, so why are you _____ the alarm? set. Incorrect. Correct Answer: setting the alarm? improve your english for free. duolingo. Download the world's #1 language learning app. Download on the App Store. GET IT ON Google Play.
summary: The ad demonstrates the Duolingo app's interactive English lessons, showing exercises like sentence completion, speaking practice, and fill-in-the-blanks. It highlights how the app provides instant feedback on mistakes to facilitate learning. The final call to action invites users to download the free app to improve their English.
